subcodes.first_line: This is a perspicuous Book sent down unto the Trustworthy One, who hath believed in the Day of Judgment and hath traversed the path of certitude. O Trustworthy One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب مبین نزل للامین الذی آمن بیوم الدین و سلک منهج الیقین ان یا امین لو
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
